caption: A person's hands work on a crafting project atop a white gridded cutting mat. The person wears a white smartwatch and a ring on their left hand. Various paper elements are scattered across the surface, including green and yellow patterned paper shaped like Christmas trees, a dark brown rectangular piece, and white decorative squares. A red stamp and a black ink pad are positioned nearby. In the first frame, the person holds a small white square of paper. As the sequence progresses, they peel a white adhesive dot from a backing sheet and carefully apply it to the back of the white paper square. The "Stamping Jill" logo appears in the bottom left of the frames. Across the scene, the person's movements are focused on the precise placement of the adhesive to mount the white decorative piece onto the card base.
